Email Campaigns

click 24h · platform claims $103K

What email actually contributed — verified revenue down to profit
Verified revenue
$68K
across 5 sends · matched to orders
− $10K list cost
Net of list cost
$58K
after sending & audience cost
− $38K product & fulfillment
To contribution margin
$20K
CM3 · feeds Finance
M
Growth AI · Email Campaigns
High confidenceEmail platform + orders
Content mix
Last 3 sends were promotional — click rate sliding
64% of campaign revenue comes from discount codes. Brands holding a 60/40 value-to-promo ratio see ~31% higher click rates. Send a product or education email next.
Attribution gap
Platform over-reports by 34%
Your email platform claims $103K. Verified against orders: $68K. The gap is opens counted as conversions plus sales other channels drove — budget on the verified number.
Audience cost
814 unsubscribes = −$4K/mo in future revenue
Each subscriber is worth ~$1.44/mo in email. The Clearance blast alone burned 380 of them. Net revenue — verified minus list cost — is the honest scoreboard.
Every send — what the platform claimed, what your orders verify, and what it netted
